subcodes.first_line: Concerning what thou hast mentioned regarding these matters, We beseech God to open before thy face the gates of blessing and bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه در باره امور ذکر نمودید نسئل الله ان یفتح علی وجهک ابواب البرکه و النعمه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @prayer for service, @prayer for protection, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition
